title: MERSCOPE Metadata Schema
description: FAIR-compliant metadata for Vizgen MERSCOPE spatial transcriptomics data.

@context.description: JSON-LD context for linked data interoperability

transcript_file.description: Name of the detected transcripts CSV file

transcript_columns.description: Column names in the transcripts file

images_directory.description: Name of the directory containing microscopy images

image_count.description: Number of image files in the images directory

sample_image.description: Name of a sample image file

transform_file.description: Name of the micron to mosaic pixel transform file

transform_matrix.description: Affine transformation matrix for spatial registration

cell_boundaries_file.description: Name of the cell boundaries CSV file

cells_file.description: Name of the cells CSV file
